caption: The video features a close-up of a man standing outdoors, likely in a rural or open area with greenery and possibly buildings in the background. He is wearing a black jacket over a light-colored shirt. The man appears to be speaking directly to the camera, sharing a personal story. Subtitles appear on the screen, indicating that he is discussing his experience of fleeing atrocities committed by rebel groups in the Congo. His expression is serious and reflective, suggesting the gravity of the situation he is describing. The overall tone of the video seems to be one of testimony or documentary, aiming to convey a powerful message about displacement and conflict.
